# CWE-368 safe: Context Switching Race Condition (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-368-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
)

var privilegeMu sync.Mutex
var privilegedMode bool

func EnterPrivilegedMode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	privilegeMu.Lock()
	defer privilegeMu.Unlock()
	if r.Header.Get("X-Elevate") != "yes" {
		privilegedMode = false
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return os.ErrPermission
	}
	privilegedMode = true
	if !privilegedMode {
		return os.ErrPermission
	}
	return os.Setenv("MAINT_SHELL", "/bin/sh")
}
